task_completion.description: Verify that a folder named 'Ecuador Equator Project' is created in the Places panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar in the application showing a folder icon labeled 'Ecuador Equator Project'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a path named 'Equator Through Ecuador' exists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar showing a path item labeled 'Equator Through Ecuador', or the path visible on the map with its label.

task_completion.description: Verify the path traces the equator across Ecuador from the Pacific coast to the eastern border.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line on the map extending horizontally from the western coast of Ecuador (approx -81° longitude) towards the east, aligning with the 0° latitude line.

task_completion.description: Verify that a placemark named 'Mitad del Mundo Monument' exists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar showing a placemark labeled 'Mitad del Mundo Monument', or the pin visible on the map.

task_completion.description: Verify the placemark is located correctly near the monument site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The placemark pin located near Quito, extremely close to the equator line (0° latitude). Coordinates in the status bar or properties should be near -0.002, -78.456.

task_completion.description: Verify the placemark description contains coordinates and distance to the equator path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Properties' or 'Description' window for the placemark showing text that includes coordinates and a distance value.

task_completion.description: Verify the project is exported to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog or file manager window showing the file 'ecuador_equator.kml' being saved to or existing in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Google Earth GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Google Earth interface, including the 3D viewer, sidebar, and toolbar.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used application dialogs to input data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'New Path', 'New Placemark', or 'Properties' dialog boxes.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not manually write the KML file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like VS Code, gedit, vim) containing raw KML/XML code for the solution.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Equator is at 0.0° latitude. The western coast of Ecuador is approximately -81.01° longitude. The Mitad del Mundo Monument is located at -0.00218° latitude, -78.4558° longitude. The monument is geographically very close to the equator line.
